title: Analytics - Device Deleted
scenario: Analytics event for device removal in Poly Studio Mobile app does not log Device Name, PID, and Serial fields
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure at least one Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) is paired and connected.
Navigate to Device Settings by tapping the gear icon next to the device name.
Tap 'Remove Device' or the delete/trash icon to remove the device from the app.
Go to phone system Settings → Bluetooth, find the same device in the paired list, and tap 'Forget' or 'Unpair' to remove it from phone Bluetooth.
Return to Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen and confirm the device no longer appears.
Wait a few hours for Firebase Analytics to process and update event counts.
Log into Firebase Analytics console and navigate to the relevant event (e.g., 'device_removed').
Verify the analytics page displays default elements: graph, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version/build/environment.
Verify the analytics page also displays device-specific fields: Device Name, Device PID, and Device Serial.
expected: Firebase Analytics page shows default elements (graph, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version/build/environment) plus device-specific fields (Device Name, Device PID, Device Serial). The event count for the 'device_removed' event increments after a few hours.
